segments.text: [Music]
sonar equips organizations to achieve a
sustainable state of clean code through
systematic development and delivery
seamlessly integrating into your devops
workflow sonar stays with you while you
code push promote and manage your
projects
while you code sonar lint acts like a
spell checker squiggling coding issues
as it performs on the Fly analysis to
detect common mistakes tricky bugs and
security vulnerabilities all while
teaching you clean coding practices
when it's time to merge sonar Cube and
sonar Cloud will provide your team with
instant pull request feedback
[Music]
by detecting problems early in the
development workflow code flaws will be
prevented from being added to your code
base thanks to a clear go no go quality
gate
with the power of clean code in your
corner you reduce risks save time and
money increase team productivity and
confidence and sustain the life of your
software
join the millions of developers and
organizations that are making their code
and assets with clean code from sonar

fullText: [Music] sonar equips organizations to achieve a sustainable state of clean code through systematic development and delivery seamlessly integrating into your devops workflow sonar stays with you while you code push promote and manage your projects while you code sonar lint acts like a spell checker squiggling coding issues as it performs on the Fly analysis to detect common mistakes tricky bugs and security vulnerabilities all while teaching you clean coding practices when it's time to merge sonar Cube and sonar Cloud will provide your team with instant pull request feedback [Music] by detecting problems early in the development workflow code flaws will be prevented from being added to your code base thanks to a clear go no go quality gate with the power of clean code in your corner you reduce risks save time and money increase team productivity and confidence and sustain the life of your software join the millions of developers and organizations that are making their code and assets with clean code from sonar
